outreach.notes: World-expo specialist that opened a Belgrade subsidiary explicitly for Expo 2027 (founded May 2025, owner Petar Sukara). Portfolio: UAE pavilion Expo 2020 Dubai, UK pavilion Astana 2017, USA pavilion Osaka 2025. No Expo 2027 contract announced yet — prime prospect. Source (B): ekapija.com/en/news/4741060
